interior.title: Interior Design
interior.intro: Harrington's Interior Design service is a fully integrated collaboration, developed from the earliest concept to the final installation. We work with close attention to architecture, proportion, materiality and daily function, creating interiors that feel resolved, enduring and deeply personal.

process.title: Initial Consultation
process.text: We begin by understanding how you live, what the space requires and what you want it to feel like. This first conversation establishes the priorities, atmosphere and level of ambition that will shape the project moving forward.

process.title: Concept & Development
process.text: Layouts, materials, furniture and lighting are developed into a coherent design language. Each layer is refined with care, so the project reads as a complete and highly considered whole.

process.title: Execution & Styling
process.text: We oversee procurement, coordination and installation through to the final styling of the space. Our involvement ensures that the completed interior reflects the original vision with precision and consistency.

faq.question: What is included in your Interior Design service?
faq.answer: Our Interior Design service is comprehensive. It includes spatial planning, material and finish selection, custom furniture design, lighting strategy, procurement coordination and final styling, allowing the project to be carried through as a cohesive whole.

faq.question: How do I know which service is right for me?
faq.answer: The most appropriate service depends on the scale of the project and the level of involvement you require. Interior Design is best suited to full renovations, new builds or comprehensive residential transformations. We are happy to discuss your project and advise on the right approach during an initial consultation.

faq.question: How much does a project typically cost?
faq.answer: Each project is unique. Fees are determined by scope, complexity and duration, and are outlined clearly in a written proposal before work begins. We are happy to discuss anticipated investment during the initial conversation.

faq.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq.answer: A full interior design project typically spans several months, depending on the scale of the work, the complexity of the brief and the lead times of bespoke elements. A detailed timeline is provided as part of the project proposal.

faq.question: Do you work with clients outside of your local area?
faq.answer: Yes. Harrington works with private residential clients both nationally and internationally, managing projects remotely where appropriate and travelling to site at key stages when required.

interior.tagline: A complete approach to residential interiors.
interior.text: From initial concept through to final installation, each project is developed with precision and intent. Spatial planning, material selection and bespoke detailing are carefully considered to create interiors that are cohesive, refined and built to endure.

styling.title: Styling & Curation
styling.intro: Styling & Curation is the final layer that gives a space clarity, character and a sense of completion. For clients whose architecture and layout are already in place, this service refines the interior through furniture, textiles, objects and art selected with a disciplined and highly considered eye.

process.title: Initial Consultation
process.text: We begin by reviewing the space and understanding what is already established, what feels unresolved and what atmosphere you want the home to hold. This conversation informs every subsequent decision.

process.title: Curation & Sourcing
process.text: We develop a curated selection of furniture, textiles, objects and art drawn from trusted makers, galleries and suppliers. Each piece is considered in relation to the whole, so the interior feels composed rather than simply decorated.

process.title: Installation & Styling
process.text: We oversee delivery, placement and final styling in person. The result is an interior that feels layered, balanced and naturally complete, with each element contributing quietly to the overall atmosphere.

deliverables.title: Styling & Installation
deliverables.text: Final placement and styling bring the space into focus, ensuring it feels complete, lived-in and quietly elevated.

faq.question: What is included in your Styling & Curation service?
faq.answer: Styling & Curation focuses on the final refinement of a space. It typically includes furniture selection, textile direction, art and object sourcing, colour and material refinement, and on-site styling to ensure the interior feels complete and cohesive.

faq.question: How do I know which service is right for me?
faq.answer: Styling & Curation is ideal for clients whose architecture and core layout are already in place, but who want the interior to feel more resolved and considered. During an initial consultation, we can advise whether this service or a more comprehensive design approach is the right fit.

faq.question: How much does a project typically cost?
faq.answer: Investment depends on the size of the space, the level of sourcing required and the overall scope of the work. Following our initial conversation, we provide a clear proposal tailored to the project.

faq.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq.answer: Timelines vary according to the scale of the project and the lead times of selected pieces. Styling projects are often more concise than full interior design commissions, though the exact duration depends on the brief and sourcing requirements.

faq.question: Do you work with clients outside of your local area?
faq.answer: Yes. Harrington works with clients nationally and internationally, combining remote coordination with on-site visits when required to complete the project to the appropriate standard.

styling.text: Furniture, textiles, art and objects are curated with a disciplined eye. Each element is selected to enrich the atmosphere of a space, introducing depth, balance and a sense of quiet sophistication without excess.

direction.title: Project Direction
direction.intro: Project Direction is designed for clients who wish to retain oversight of their renovation or build while benefiting from a clear and considered creative framework. We define the vision, structure key decisions and guide the process with precision, allowing the project to move forward with clarity, consistency and confidence.

process.title: Initial Consultation
process.text: We begin with a detailed review of the project, including scope, priorities, timeline and constraints. This conversation allows us to identify where direction will be most valuable and to establish a framework that is both practical and design-led.

process.title: Concept & Roadmap
process.text: We develop a clear design concept supported by a structured roadmap. Key decisions, suppliers, phases and timelines are outlined with care, creating a reference point that helps guide the project from early planning through execution.

process.title: Ongoing Direction
process.text: As the project evolves, we remain available for consultations, design reviews and considered recommendations. Our role is to help maintain coherence throughout, ensuring that each decision supports the overall vision.

deliverables.text: A curated selection of suppliers, artisans and contractors aligned with the level of quality the project requires.

faq.question: What is included in your Project Direction service?
faq.answer: Project Direction provides a clear design framework for clients managing their own renovation or build. It typically includes concept development, layout guidance, material direction, supplier recommendations and ongoing consultation at key stages of the project.

faq.question: How do I know which service is right for me?
faq.answer: The right service depends on the level of support you need. Project Direction is ideal for clients who want to remain closely involved while benefiting from expert guidance. We are happy to discuss your project and recommend the most suitable approach during an initial consultation.

faq.question: How much does a project typically cost?
faq.answer: Each project is different, and fees are shaped by scope, complexity and duration. After our initial conversation, we provide a clear proposal outlining the level of support required and the associated investment.

faq.question: How long does a typical project take?
faq.answer: Timelines vary depending on the size of the project and the pace of decision-making. Project Direction can support shorter renovation phases or longer, more complex builds, with involvement tailored to the needs of the process.

faq.question: Do you work with clients outside of your local area?
faq.answer: Yes. Harrington works with clients nationally and internationally, providing direction remotely where appropriate and travelling when the project requires on-site input.

direction.tagline: Consistency at every stage of the project.
direction.text: A structured and continuous oversight from design development through completion. Working closely with clients, consultants and craftsmen, the studio ensures clarity, cohesion and a consistently high level of execution.
